package rulecoverage

func PositiveUpdatesMapAllocatedPerRow() string {
    ruleID := "updates_map_allocated_per_row"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "GORM Updates(map[string]...) maps allocated inside loops for per-row updates."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
